title: The Tavern

The Tavern Last updated: Exalt Version 5.12.0.0 (June 2025) Limit of 25 player(s) Dust Drops 31-39 41-47 0 The Tavern is a high-level dungeon that is a source of Potions of Vitality, Greater Potions of Vitality and Potions of Mana. It is also the source of the untiered The Right Hook, Tipsy Topper, Double Vision Darts, Cask Corslet and Brewer’s Bangle. The dungeon is a guaranteed drop from the Beer God and Sigma Werewolf. It also has a chance to drop from the Spitting Arachnid. The Realm Eye says: So you wish to know about the tavern? The tavern is as it sounds, a tavern that serves food and drink to any customers that stop by.The Barkeep there serves a wide variety of drinks appropriate for the various patrons, there are few other places within the realm you will find the different factions of oryx’s forces mingling together.It’s entrance is guarded from the heroes of the nexus by the Beer God, who acts as a bouncer in exchange for copious amounts of alcohol. Key The The Tavern Key is available in the Nexus for 150 .
